differential_diagnoses: Acute viral myocarditis secondary to arboviral infection
Septic shock (secondary to spontaneous bacterial peritonitis or translocation)
next_steps: Send diagnostic testing for arboviruses (Dengue NS1, PCR, IgM; Zika; Chikungunya)
Obtain coagulation panel (PT/INR, PTT, Fibrinogen) to evaluate for disseminated intravascular coagulation
Send ferritin and soluble IL-2 receptor (sCD25) to evaluate for HLH
Repeat thick and thin malaria smears to ensure sensitivity
Continue broad-spectrum antibiotics and hemodynamic support (vasopressors/judicious fluid resuscitation) while awaiting diagnostic results
Monitor cardiac troponins and brain natriuretic peptide (BNP) in the context of global biventricular dysfunction
Consult infectious disease, critical care, and cardiology services immediately
